title: 信息日报 2026-06-15

headline.title: 世界反应：伊朗与美国达成协议
headline.summary: 伊朗与美国签署初步协议，结束战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，巴基斯坦、卡塔尔等国表示欢迎，认为此举将促进地区持久和平。
headline.title_en: World reacts as Iran and US reach deal
headline.summary_en: Iran and the US signed an interim agreement to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Pakistan, Qatar and other nations applauded the deal as a step towards regional peace.
headline.original_title: World reacts as Iran and US reach deal
headline.reason: 该协议引发全球金融市场剧烈波动、能源市场重估，并得到多方回应，是当日最具全球影响力的事件。
headline.reason_en: The agreement triggered global market swings, energy price reassessments, and widespread international reactions, making it the most impactful event of the day.
